prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should directly use the key gases (H2, CH4) from the failure mode data instead of listing all available sensors. Improve justification by citing specific failure mode characteristics."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should directly use the key gases (H2, CH4) from the failure mode data instead of listing all available sensors. Improve justification by citing specific failure mode characteristics.
